---
title: "Nick + Melissa Collab File"
format: html
---


## Git Collaboration Tips

### Tips: Nick

- always be collaborating
- collaborating is good
- thank you for collaborating with me


### Tips: Melissa Palmisciano

- Communicate often
- Work in separate designated sections of the document
- Etc!

## How to Create a Merge Conflict 

### Merge Conflict: Owner Resolves

This is definitely awesome

     .-"""-.__     
    /      ' o'\
 ,-;  '.  :   _c
:_."\._ ) ::-"
       ""m "m

### Merge Conflict: Collaborator Resolves

sorry for lack of rodent

## Summary: How to Avoid Merge Conflicts

<Owner and Collaborator use best practices to write some concluding tips here!>
